title: Refinement Report
description: Aggregated report synthesized from individual advisor verdicts. Produced by phase-3.5 and phase-5.5 orchestrator modules and sent back to the shape or analyze phase for refinement.

beadId.title: Bead ID
beadId.description: The bead identifier that was reviewed by the advisor panel.

phase.title: Originating Phase
phase.description: The orchestrator phase that initiated the advisor review round.

advisors.title: Advisor Verdicts
advisors.description: Array of individual advisor verdicts collected during this review round.

items.title: Individual Advisor Verdict
items.description: A single advisor's assessment, matching the advisor-verdict schema shape.

agent.title: Advisor Agent Name
agent.description: The advisor agent that produced this verdict.

concerns.title: Concerns
concerns.description: List of issues or gaps the advisor identified.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.description: List of suggested refinements or changes.

overallVerdict.title: Overall Verdict
overallVerdict.description: Derived aggregate verdict. 'clean' only if every advisor verdict is 'clean'; 'refinement-needed' otherwise.

summary.title: Summary
summary.description: One-paragraph synthesis of all advisor feedback for the next-round dispatcher. Highlights the most critical concerns and recommended next steps.
